# Extracao: main list 4

- **Tipo:** TXT
- **Tamanho:** 0 MB

---

Well, we're finally coming up for air - we
"launched" our "Creating Copy That Sells" course
today at noon, and it's been pretty insane ever
since. 

It's amazing that it has only been about eight
hours since we launched. It feels like a lifetime.

The phone was ringing off the hook, and the orders
were piling into the web site. Luckily enough, our
web server was able to handle the load (that's a
real consideration when you are talking about huge
traffic to a web site.)

Predictably, we sold out our first Winner's
Weekend bonus nearly immediately... so if you
haven't jumped on board yet, well... you missed
that one. Sorry about that...

HOWEVER, there are 16 other bonuses that are
still available... but they will be also be going
"off the board" soon. The next up will likely be
our Mastermind Study Groups - you will have to go
to the site to read the full description of this
bonus, but it could well be the single most
powerful bonus you ever receive with any product.

But that bonus is only available to the first 200
people to enroll... obviously, we can't be sure
exactly when this will sell out, but at the
current rate we expect it will be gone very soon.

Of course, I don't want all this talk of bonuses
to overshadow what's in the actual course...

This is the deal - in a rather short period of
time I have gone from copywriting newbie to
writing 19 different "million dollar" sales
letters.

Along the way, there were lots of lessons learned
- from both my huge successes and my failures. I
have packed every ounce of lessons learned into
this course... and then we put it into a structure
that will virtually guarantee that you will go
through the entire course and implement these
lessons that have been worth so much to me.

The bottom line is that copywriting is the single
most lucrative skill you can have - and this
course is the single best way to get that skill
(or, if you are already a skilled copywriter... to
hone that skill.)

And if you want to get the best deal, then you
should act quickly before you miss out on any more
bonuses. Here is the link:

http://


best regards,
Bill Glazer
